scripts.dev: npm run research:searxng:start && node scripts/free-dev-ports.mjs 8787 5187 && set TELEGRAM_SDVG_ENABLED=1&& set MEDIA_TIKTOK_FALLBACK=1&& set TELEGRAM_BASE_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8081/bot&& set TELEGRAM_BASE_FILE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8081/file&& concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c "cyan,magenta" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm run dev:frontend:wait"
scripts.dev:frontend:wait: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:8787 && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.guard:ci: npm run guard:encoding && npm run guard:ui:utf8
